name: Easy Layered Buckeyes
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter.
2. Add the peanut butter and stir until combined.
3. Remove from heat.
4. Gradually add the powdered sugar, stirring until smooth.
5. Press into an 8 x 8 inch pan.
6. Melt the chocolate chips in a microwave oven on high, stirring after 1 minute and checking every 30 seconds thereafter.
7. Stir well and spread over the peanut butter mixture.
8. Let stand to cool or chill.
9. Cut into squares. Makes 20.
